subject: [CPS] Fix issues in the ncmp-dmi-plugin charts
commit_message:
[CPS] Fix issues in the ncmp-dmi-plugin charts

- added serviceMonitor and removed annotation for prometheus scraping
- changed readiness dependency from core-db to core app
- removed unused environment variables
- make cps-core and sdnc url configurable
- Added rolling restart in ncmp-dmi-plugin

Issue-ID: CPS-669
Signed-off-by: Renu Kumari <renu.kumari@bell.ca>
Change-Id: Ia4c3ccdac32a97d75b98ce4cbadaf74c5493f06c

Patch Set 10:

what's the difference between this one and https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/oom/+/124131?

Patch Set 10:

> Patch Set 10:
> 
> what's the difference between this one and https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/oom/+/124131?

CPS has three components under it. 
1. CPS-core
2. ncmp-dmi-plugin
3. cps-temporal

This patch is to fix issues in the ncmp-dmi-plugin component.

Patch Set 10:

> Patch Set 10:
> 
> > Patch Set 10:
> > 
> > what's the difference between this one and https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/oom/+/124131?
> 
> CPS has three components under it. 
> 1. CPS-core
> 2. ncmp-dmi-plugin
> 3. cps-temporal
> 
> This patch is to fix issues in the ncmp-dmi-plugin component.

And the 'https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/oom/+/124131' is for cps-core.
